inst✝ : LawfulMonad m

i : Nat
f : α → m α
⊢ SatisfiesM (fun x => x.size = a.size)
    (if h : i < a.size then

      let v := a.get idx;
      do
      let v ← f v
      pure (a.set idx v)
    else pure a)
